name: GOLFTEC White Plains
address: 50 Main St Suite 185, White Plains, NY 10606
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting center that provides data-based coaching and practice experiences. Utilizing advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION and high-speed video analysis, along with launch monitors, the facility offers personalized game plans for players of all skill levels. GOLFTEC focuses on structured improvement through Swing Evaluations, personalized coaching, and practice memberships, with a mission to provide clear answers and a proven path for golfers to achieve their goals. The center also offers custom club fitting services, utilizing launch monitors and shaft optimization to match golfers with equipment that averages 21 more yards off the tee.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION motion tracking and high-speed video analysis
Comprehensive improvement strategy starting with a foundational Swing Evaluation
Access to advanced launch monitors for precise swing and club data feedback
Custom club fitting technology to optimize equipment for distance and accuracy

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides club fitting services and can recommend equipment tailored to your swing. For lessons, you can use your own clubs or utilize equipment available at the center during your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy regarding outside food or drinks, so it is best to contact the center directly for details on their BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC's primary focus is on instruction and practice using simulator technology rather than traditional 18-hole play. Simulator time may vary depending on the specific experience or package selected.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers instruction and programs designed for juniors and youth, making it suitable for young golfers. However, specific amenities or policies for children are not detailed on the website.
